---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation you are experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Explain the feature or improvement you would like to see.

## Expected Benefits

Describe how this feature would help users or improve the project.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative solutions or workarounds you considered.

## Example Use Case

Provide a practical example of how the feature would be used.

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, links, diagrams or other relevant information.

## Contribution

Would you be willing to help implement this feature?

- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
- [ ] Maybe
